stemHtml: Is a pilot able to change the airport data in the navigational database of the FMS?

options.a: Yes, and to retrieve old information (original database) there is a “recycle bin” option. There you cancel what you just inserted.
options.b: Yes, but to go back (retrieve) to previous data you need to reload the “old” database.
options.c: Yes, the data can be changed, and to retrieve the old database you need to switch on and off the FMS.
